commit_scope: Allow browser read-ping attribution headers through API CORS so home-link view credit can flow from the deployed web client.

local_validation.summary: The API still avoids wildcard CORS methods and now accepts the browser preflight for /api/views/ping with content-type, x-contributor-id, x-session-fingerprint, and x-referrer-contributor-id.

deploy_validation.details: Pending Hostinger auto-deploy and public browser preflight validation after merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local CORS proof is complete; CI and public deployment proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: Per-link live audit for /vision found direct /api/views/ping attribution worked, but browser preflight returned 400 Disallowed CORS headers for x-contributor-id and the live client also sends x-session-fingerprint.
The deployed web client sends X-Contributor-Id and X-Session-Fingerprint from AttributedInternalLink/RouteReadPing attribution pings.
The CORS allow_headers list now includes X-Contributor-Id, X-Session-Fingerprint, and X-Referrer-Contributor-Id.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Browser-origin OPTIONS preflight for /api/views/ping with attribution headers returns 200 and the deployed web client can send credited view pings.
